extension.summary: InfinityTester v2.0.1 - Player profissional para streams IPTV
InfinityTester v2.0.1 - Professional IPTV stream player
extension.description: Player profissional para streams IPTV com suporte a HLS, DASH, MP4, MKV e IPTV direto. Fallback automatico entre inputstream.ffmpegdirect, inputstream.adaptive e player nativo. Desenvolvido pela equipe PLUGN.
Professional IPTV stream player with HLS, DASH, MP4, MKV and direct IPTV support. Automatic fallback between inputstream.ffmpegdirect, inputstream.adaptive and native player. Developed by PLUGN Team.
extension.news:
v2.0.1 (2026-04-15) - Correcao critica: reproducao agora usa xbmc.Player().play() diretamente - Correcao: stream_type 'direct' agora detecta automaticamente o tipo pela URL - Compatibilidade garantida quando chamado via plugin:// de outro addon
v2.0.0 (2026-04-15) - Reescrito do zero pela equipe PLUGN - Suporte a HLS, DASH, MP4, MKV, IPTV direto - Fallback automatico entre players - Codigo limpo e transparente - Integracao com PLUGN STREAMING VIP
